metadata.file_name: Billy Joel - Just the Way You Are.flac
metadata.title: Just the Way You Are
metadata.lyrics:
[00:08.44] Don't go changing to try and please me
[00:14.91] You never let me down before, mmm-hmm-hmm
[00:22.15] Don't imagine you're too familiar
[00:29.11] And I don't see you anymore
[00:34.98] I would not leave you in times of trouble
[00:43.06] We never could have come this far, mmm-hmm
[00:49.88] I took the good times, I'll take the bad times
[00:56.75] I take you just the way you are
[01:04.24] 
[01:07.49] Don't go trying some new fashion
[01:14.23] Don't change the color of your hair, mmm-hmm-hmm
[01:21.06] You always have my unspoken passion
[01:28.06] Although I might not seem to care
[01:33.41] I don't want clever conversation
[01:41.76] Never want to work that hard, mmm-hmm-hmm
[01:48.66] I just want someone that I can talk to
[01:55.33] I want you just the way you are
[02:01.33] 
[02:06.29] Need to know that you will always be
[02:12.85] The same old someone that I knew
[02:18.20] Oh, what will it take 'til you believe in me?
[02:26.52] The way that I believe in you
[02:31.94] I said, "I love you," that's forever
[02:40.59] And this, I promise from the heart, mmm-hmm-hmm
[02:47.35] I couldn't love you any better
[02:53.93] I love you just the way you are
[03:03.53] Alright
[03:06.61] 
[03:29.69] I don't want clever conversation
[03:38.85] I never want to work that hard, mmm-hmm
[03:46.06] I just want someone that I can talk to
[03:53.47] I want you just the way you are, oh
[04:03.60]
